emails.subject: Re: EOL / Credit / GCP Responses 6/8/00
emails.body: Re: EOL Credit GCP Responses 6/8/00 Great! Have a wonderful weekend hope all goes well with the move. As I mentioned, we'll be out of town this weekend, so Emma and I will try to stop by on Monday to see the house and the kitties! Leslie
